summary: Core package tests and checks are green, and the F4 raw stream/pubsub blocker is resolved: admin-authorized raw SSE live delivery now accepts canonical adapter.raw stdout/stderr events through the shared redaction/truncation path, browser/session raw access remains forbidden, and raw durable replay remains empty for ephemeral raw events.

commands.evidence: 1 file, 8 tests passed, including admin raw SSE live delivery and non-admin browser 403 coverage
events, visibility, subscriptions, command, run-state-machine checks passed

invariants.name: observe_passive
evidence: packages/daemon/test/daemon.test.ts keeps observers passive without explicit wake: mock-builder llmCalls=1, mock-observer llmCalls=0.
No exact 100-message dedicated invariant test found; equivalent daemon-level behavior proves observer does not run on normal assisted-room user message.

invariants.name: run_level_diff
evidence: packages/artifacts/test/artifacts.test.ts routes non-terminal writes through shadow buffer and builds one run-level diff.
packages/artifacts/test/artifacts.test.ts builds terminal run-level diff from isolated worktree with final content wins and reverted files omitted.
Source packages/artifacts/src/index.ts ArtifactFS.diffFiles sorts paths, compares final content to base, and returns a single DiffArtifact from buildRunArtifact().

invariants.name: raw_flood_pubsub_isolation
evidence: packages/bus/test/event-bus.test.ts tracks bounded PubSub channel stats and separate adapter_raw/message_delta capacities.
packages/bus/src/index.ts BoundedPubSub uses per-channel capacities and non-durable drop accounting, so raw cannot consume durable/main channel capacity.

packages/daemon/src/index.ts keeps view=raw admin-gated in sse(), sends SSE frames through redactAndTruncate(JSON.stringify(event), 64 * 1024), and visible(... view='raw') now permits only adapter.raw.stdout / adapter.raw.stderr live events after room/run filters.

packages/daemon/test/daemon.test.ts requires admin for raw SSE and streams live adapter raw events only: browser session receives 403 requires_admin_scope, stored admin bearer receives a live adapter.raw.stdout frame with AGENTHUB_TOKEN redacted, unrelated run raw stderr is filtered, and replayDurableSinceSeq(view='raw') remains [].

invariants.name: claimed_reclaim_lifecycle
evidence: packages/orchestrator/test/orchestrator.test.ts startup recovery clears locks, preserves queued/waiting, fails stale claimed/starting, finalizes cancelling.
packages/orchestrator/test/orchestrator.test.ts ReclaimStaleClaimedRun attaches resumable sessions and fails missing attach as fresh_session_required.
No literal kill -9 integration test found; source+unit coverage exercises restart scan semantics and stale claimed lifecycle behavior.

invariants.name: permission_queue_idempotency
evidence: packages/permissions/test/permissions.test.ts serializes per-session requests and deduplicates pending idempotency keys.
Queued requests have expires_at=null until presented, and promotion starts a fresh active timeout.

invariants.name: waiting_permission_resume
evidence: packages/orchestrator/test/orchestrator.test.ts emits waiting_permission then agent.run.resumed when markRunning resumes a waiting_permission run, before failed terminal event.

apps/web/src/hooks/useProjector.ts represents agent.run.waiting_permission status in projection. It does not represent agent.run.resumed explicitly, but run lifecycle event exists and state transition is covered.

invariants.name: preview_security_isolation
evidence: apps/web/src/components/cards/PreviewCard.tsx uses iframe sandbox='allow-scripts' and does not include allow-same-origin.
packages/artifacts/test/artifacts.test.ts stores one-time preview token expiry metadata.
packages/security/test/security.test.ts safe URI tests reject unsafe data MIME and external HTTP unless signed preview token allows daemon-origin URI.
No browser test proves iframe cannot access daemon API; source-level sandbox and auth/CSRF tests are sufficient for MVP but would benefit from an exact e2e.

invariants.name: workspace_file_lock_matrix
evidence: packages/orchestrator/test/orchestrator.test.ts agent, room, file, and workspace locks block conflicting runs, including workspace lock blocked by existing file lock.

invariants.name: replay_projection_stability
evidence: packages/bus/test/event-bus.test.ts persists durable seq and replays by cursor with room/run/view filters.
packages/daemon/test/daemon.test.ts streams durable replay with main/detail visibility split.
apps/web/e2e/main-detail-projection.spec.ts passes main/detail projection and Run Detail tab behavior.

No exact byte-identical projection-from-seq=1 snapshot test found. Existing deterministic ordered replay and e2e are stable enough for non-raw MVP projection, and raw live-only SSE coverage now proves the protected raw stream contract without falsely replaying ephemeral raw events.

invariants.name: v1_stub_only_scope
evidence: packages/adapters/opencode,codex,langgraph,a2a test files confirm detect()=[] and runAgent throws deterministic not implemented errors.
packages/context/src/index.ts NoopVectorIndex/NoopMemoryAdapter return empty/no-op and roomSearchMemoryTool throws tool_not_found.
packages/daemon/src/index.ts V1-style cost/board/timeline endpoints return 501/404 V1 roadmap responses.

protectedContractAssessment.noStartRun: pass via command:check and CommandBus forbiddenCommandTypes/internalOnly WakeAgent guard
protectedContractAssessment.wakeAgentOnlyModelEntry: pass via daemon Mock Solo path and CommandBus internal-only WakeAgent guard
protectedContractAssessment.runLifecycleOwnsRunEvents: pass via orchestrator lifecycle tests and run-state-machine check
protectedContractAssessment.artifactFsFileGate: pass for adapter-boundary ArtifactFS and sensitive write denial tests
protectedContractAssessment.localFirstScope: pass by dependency/check evidence and source inspection; no SaaS/Postgres/Redis/WS hub/native mobile/marketplace found in reviewed surfaces

blockers: Resolved: raw stream/pubsub contract now has admin-only live SSE delivery for adapter.raw stdout/stderr while preserving empty durable replay for ephemeral raw events.

Non-blocking follow-up: replay/projection still lacks the ideal byte-identical from seq=1 snapshot test, but existing deterministic replay/e2e plus raw live-only coverage are sufficient for MVP scope fidelity.
